name: Bronson BSE
description: Bronson (BSE) are a predominately Mexican-American street gang located in the Mid City / Washington Heights area of Central Los Angeles, California. They are named for the street, Bronson Ave, that runs north and south just east of Crenshaw Blvd.

sources.title: Bronson (BSE) from Mid City / Washington Heights area of Central Los Angeles, California — StreetGangs
